4.description: Present value of dividends and liquidation value from the perspective of a trader. The thick (thin) solid curvePVn,f$PV_{n,f}$(PV−n,f$PV_{-n,f}$) is the present value when tradern$n$sells the stock at price equal to his own valuation of fundamentals (the average of other traders' valuations).
